body:
## Summary
- Extend the shared Russian to English compositional fallback for short search/action phrases, including genitive `examples of agreement` rendering.
- Mirror the fallback in the browser worker and add Rust plus Playwright regressions for issue #230.
- Add the issue #230 case study, raw GitHub/log artifacts, online research notes, and changelog fragment.

## Tests
- `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features`
- `rust-script scripts/check-file-size.rs`
- `bun run build:web`
- `git diff --exit-code -- src/web/vendor.bundle.js src/web/ocr.bundle.js`
- `npm run --prefix tests/e2e check:i18n`
- `npm run --prefix tests/e2e check:language-parity`
- `npm run --prefix tests/e2e check:intent-coverage`
- `GITHUB_BASE_REF=main rust-script scripts/check-changelog-fragment.rs`
- `GITHUB_EVENT_NAME=pull_request GITHUB_HEAD_REF=issue-230-a9436b51254d GITHUB_BASE_REF=main rust-script scripts/check-version-modification.rs`
- `cargo test --test unit specification::translation_via_links:: -- --nocapture`
- `npm --prefix tests/e2e run test:local -- issue-230.spec.js`
- `cargo test --all-features --verbose`
- `cargo test --doc --verbose`

Case study: `docs/case-studies/issue-230/README.md`

Fixes #230

## Working session summary

Implemented, pushed, and marked PR #231 ready for review:

https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/pull/231

Commit: `cbfe35c Fix Russian search phrase translation`

The fix extends the shared Russian to English compositional fallback in [src/translation/pipeline.rs](/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1779473932728/src/translation/pipeline.rs) and mirrors it in [src/web/formal_ai_worker.js](/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1779473932728/src/web/formal_ai_worker.js), so the reported typo prompt now returns:

`Find synonyms or examples of agreement`

Added Rust and browser regressions, a changelog fragment, and the requested case study under [docs/case-studies/issue-230/README.md](/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1779473932728/docs/case-studies/issue-230/README.md). Research references are recorded there, including Wiktionary, Wikipedia, and Reverso Context.

- Local checks passed, including `cargo fmt`, `cargo clippy`, focused Rust/browser regressions, full `cargo test --all-features --verbose`, and doc tests.
- GitHub CI/CD run passed for pushed SHA `cbfe35c21612275790ecfb55253bbc636f1d70de`: https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/actions/runs/26305314310
